tasks.title: Create Database Migration Script
tasks.description: Create SQL migration script to add promotion_email_template and promotion_email_sent_log tables
tasks.details:
Create migration script that follows existing project conventions to add two new tables:
- promotion_email_template - Stores email templates with appropriate columns
- promotion_email_sent_log - Tracks sent emails
- Define foreign keys, indexes, and add table comments for documentation
- Follow reference in documentation/promotion_email_redesign/migrations/001_create_promotion_tables.sql
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the migration script runs without errors and creates the tables with correct structure, constraints, and indexes.

tasks.title: Create PromotionEmailTemplate Entity
tasks.description: Create JPA entity class for promotion_email_template table with all required fields and relationships
tasks.details:
Implement JPA entity class with:
- All table columns mapped to entity fields (id, tenantId, eventId, templateName, subject, bodyHtml, etc.)
- Define relationships to EventDetails, DiscountCode, UserProfile
- Add validation annotations (NotNull, Size, etc.)
- Implement equals/hashCode methods
- Add audit fields handling (createdAt, updatedAt)
tasks.testStrategy: Test entity mapping with basic persistence tests. Verify that all fields are correctly mapped and relationships are properly defined.

tasks.title: Create PromotionEmailSentLog Entity
tasks.description: Create JPA entity class for promotion_email_sent_log table with all required fields and relationships
tasks.details:
Implement JPA entity class with:
- All table columns mapped to entity fields
- Define relationships to PromotionEmailTemplate, EventDetails, DiscountCode, UserProfile
- Add validation annotations
- Create enum for emailStatus (SENT, FAILED, BOUNCED)
tasks.testStrategy: Test entity mapping with basic persistence tests. Verify that all fields are correctly mapped and relationships are properly defined.

tasks.title: Create PromotionEmailTemplateRepository
tasks.description: Create Spring Data JPA repository interface for PromotionEmailTemplate with custom query methods
tasks.details:
Implement repository interface with:
- Standard CRUD operations (inherited from JpaRepository)
- findByTenantIdAndEventId - Find templates by tenant and event
- findByTenantIdAndIsActive - Find active templates
- findByTenantIdAndEventIdAndTemplateName - Check uniqueness
tasks.testStrategy: Test repository methods with integration tests to verify queries return expected results.

tasks.title: Create PromotionEmailSentLogRepository
tasks.description: Create Spring Data JPA repository interface for PromotionEmailSentLog with custom query methods
tasks.details:
Implement repository interface with:
- Standard CRUD operations
- findByTenantIdAndEventId - Find logs by event
- findByTenantIdAndTemplateId - Find logs by template
- findByTenantIdAndSentAtBetween - Find logs by date range
- findByTenantIdAndEmailStatus - Find logs by status
tasks.testStrategy: Test repository methods with integration tests to verify queries return expected results.

tasks.title: Create PromotionEmailTemplateDTO
tasks.description: Create DTO class for promotion email templates matching OpenAPI schema
tasks.details:
Implement DTO class with:
- All fields from entity
- Nested DTOs (EventDetailsDTO, DiscountCodeDTO, UserProfileDTO)
- Ensure it matches OpenAPI schema definition
tasks.testStrategy: Verify DTO serialization/deserialization works correctly with JSON.

tasks.title: Create PromotionEmailTemplateFormDTO
tasks.description: Create form DTO for template create/update operations
tasks.details:
Implement form DTO with fields:
- eventId, templateName, subject, bodyHtml, headerImageUrl, footerImageUrl, discountCodeId, isActive
- Add validation annotations
- Include appropriate constructors and conversion methods
tasks.testStrategy: Test validation rules and conversion to/from entity.

tasks.title: Create SendPromotionEmailDTO
tasks.description: Create DTO for email sending requests
tasks.details:
Implement DTO with fields:
- templateId, recipientEmail (optional), isTestEmail, subjectOverride (optional), bodyHtmlOverride (optional)
- Add validation annotations
- Include appropriate constructors
tasks.testStrategy: Test validation rules and verify it can be properly serialized/deserialized.

tasks.title: Create PromotionEmailSentLogDTO
tasks.description: Create DTO for sent log entries
tasks.details:
Implement DTO with:
- All relevant fields from PromotionEmailSentLog entity
- Appropriate nested DTOs
- Ensure it matches OpenAPI schema definition
tasks.testStrategy: Verify DTO serialization/deserialization works correctly with JSON.

tasks.title: Implement PromotionEmailTemplateService
tasks.description: Create service layer for template operations with CRUD methods and business logic
tasks.details:
Implement service with methods:
- createTemplate(formDTO, tenantId, userId) - Create new template
- updateTemplate(id, formDTO, tenantId) - Update existing template
- getTemplate(id, tenantId) - Get template by ID
- listTemplates(criteria, tenantId) - List templates with filtering
- deleteTemplate(id, tenantId) - Soft delete (set isActive=false)
- validateTemplateName(name, eventId, tenantId, excludeId) - Check uniqueness

Enforce business rules:
- Template name must be unique per event per tenant
- Event must exist and belong to tenant
- Discount code (if provided) must exist and belong to event
- Auto-set createdById and updatedAt timestamps
tasks.testStrategy: Write unit tests covering all methods and business rules. Test validation logic and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement PromotionEmailService
tasks.description: Create service for sending test and bulk emails, with logging functionality
tasks.details:
Implement service with methods:
- sendTestEmail(templateId, recipientEmail, tenantId, userId) - Send test email
- sendBulkEmail(templateId, recipientEmails, tenantId, userId) - Send bulk emails
- buildEmailContent(template, overrides) - Build final email content
- logEmailSent(logEntry) - Log sent email

Integration points:
- Use existing email service infrastructure
- Retrieve event registrants from EventAttendee/EventTicketTransaction tables
- Handle email sending failures gracefully
- Log all email attempts (success and failure)
tasks.testStrategy: Test email building logic, integration with email service, and error handling. Mock external dependencies.

tasks.title: Implement PromotionEmailSentLogService
tasks.description: Create service for querying email logs with filtering capabilities
tasks.details:
Implement service with methods:
- listLogs(criteria, tenantId) - List logs with filtering
- getLog(id, tenantId) - Get log entry by ID
- getEmailStatistics(eventId, tenantId) - Get email statistics (optional)
tasks.testStrategy: Test query methods with various filter combinations. Verify tenant isolation works correctly.

tasks.title: Implement Template CRUD Endpoints
tasks.description: Create REST controller endpoints for template operations
tasks.details:
Implement endpoints:
- GET /api/promotion-email-templates - List templates with filtering
- GET /api/promotion-email-templates/{id} - Get template by ID
- POST /api/promotion-email-templates - Create new template
- PATCH /api/promotion-email-templates/{id} - Update template
- DELETE /api/promotion-email-templates/{id} - Delete template (soft delete)

Support query parameters for filtering and pagination
Ensure proper validation of tenant ID from security context
tasks.testStrategy: Write integration tests for all endpoints. Test filtering, pagination, error responses, and security constraints.

tasks.title: Implement Email Sending Endpoints
tasks.description: Create REST controller endpoints for sending test and bulk emails
tasks.details:
Implement endpoints:
- POST /api/promotion-email-templates/{id}/send-test - Send test email
- POST /api/promotion-email-templates/{id}/send-bulk - Send bulk email

Requirements:
- Test email: Send to single recipient
- Bulk email: Send to all event registrants if recipientEmails not provided
- Log all email attempts
- Return detailed success/failure counts
tasks.testStrategy: Test both endpoints with various scenarios including success and failure cases. Verify logging functionality.

tasks.title: Implement Log Query Endpoints
tasks.description: Create REST controller endpoints for querying email logs
tasks.details:
Implement endpoints:
- GET /api/promotion-email-sent-logs - List sent email logs with filtering
- GET /api/promotion-email-sent-logs/{id} - Get log entry by ID

Support query parameters for filtering by event, template, date range, status, etc.
Implement pagination
tasks.testStrategy: Test endpoints with various filter combinations. Verify pagination works correctly.

tasks.title: Integrate with Event System
tasks.description: Ensure proper integration with existing EventDetails entity and service
tasks.details:
Implement integration:
- Validate event exists and belongs to tenant
- Retrieve event registrants for bulk email
- Use existing event service/repository
- Handle error cases gracefully
tasks.testStrategy: Test validation logic and integration with event system. Mock event service for unit tests.

tasks.title: Integrate with Discount Code System
tasks.description: Link templates to discount codes and retrieve discount code details
tasks.details:
Implement integration:
- Validate discount code exists and belongs to event
- Retrieve discount code details for email content
- Use existing DiscountCode entity/repository
- Handle cases where discount code is not provided
tasks.testStrategy: Test validation logic and integration with discount code system. Mock discount code service for unit tests.

tasks.title: Integrate with Email Service
tasks.description: Use existing email sending infrastructure for promotion emails
tasks.details:
Implement integration:
- Reuse existing email service/configuration
- Support HTML email content
- Handle email sending errors
- Implement proper error handling and retries if needed
tasks.testStrategy: Test integration with email service. Mock email service for unit tests.

tasks.title: Integrate with User Profile System
tasks.description: Track who created templates and sent emails by linking to UserProfile
tasks.details:
Implement integration:
- Link createdById to UserProfile
- Link sentById to UserProfile
- Retrieve user details for audit trail
- Handle cases where user no longer exists
tasks.testStrategy: Test integration with user profile system. Mock user service for unit tests.

tasks.title: Update Swagger/OpenAPI Documentation
tasks.description: Add API documentation for all new endpoints
tasks.details:
Update documentation:
- Document all endpoints with proper annotations
- Define request/response schemas
- Add example requests/responses
- Document query parameters
- Add error response documentation
- Ensure documentation matches implementation
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that Swagger UI correctly displays all endpoints and that the generated documentation is accurate.

tasks.title: Write Unit Tests for Services
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive unit tests for all service layer components
tasks.details:
Write tests for:
- Template creation/update/delete logic
- Email sending logic
- Validation rules
- Error handling
- Edge cases

Use mocking for external dependencies
tasks.testStrategy: Aim for high code coverage. Test happy paths and error scenarios.

tasks.title: Write Integration Tests for REST Endpoints
tasks.description: Implement integration tests for all REST API endpoints
tasks.details:
Write tests for:
- All CRUD operations
- Email sending endpoints
- Filtering and pagination
- Error scenarios
- Security constraints

Use test database and mock external services where appropriate
tasks.testStrategy: Test API contract compliance, status codes, response formats, and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement Error Handling
tasks.description: Ensure robust error handling across the application
tasks.details:
Implement error handling:
- Return appropriate HTTP status codes
- Provide clear error messages in response body
- Log errors for debugging
- Handle validation errors gracefully
- Handle database constraint violations
- Handle email sending failures
tasks.testStrategy: Test error scenarios and verify appropriate status codes and error messages are returned.

tasks.title: Implement Security Measures
tasks.description: Ensure all endpoints are properly secured with tenant isolation
tasks.details:
Implement security measures:
- Validate tenant ID from security context for all endpoints
- Ensure users can only access templates for their tenant
- Validate user permissions (admin only)
- Sanitize HTML content in email body
- Validate email addresses
- Implement rate limiting for email sending endpoints
tasks.testStrategy: Test tenant isolation, permission checks, and input sanitization.

tasks.title: Optimize Performance
tasks.description: Implement performance optimizations for database queries and email sending
tasks.details:
Implement optimizations:
- Ensure database indexes are used effectively
- Implement pagination for list endpoints
- Consider async processing for bulk emails
- Optimize email sending batch size
- Add caching where appropriate
tasks.testStrategy: Perform load testing to verify performance under load. Check query execution plans.
